name: 30"x 24" Stylized Bird Canvas Board Framed Art - Threshold™
description:
Brighten up your home with the 30"x 24" Stylized Bird Canvas Board Framed Art from Threshold™, featuring vibrant tones and a bold artistic flair. This horizontal piece with a golden frame showcases a bird drawing that brings a pop of color and character to your walls. The durable frame and canvas offer lasting quality, while the sawtooth back ensures easy hanging. Perfect for adding a creative touch to your decor, this artwork will uplift any space with its lively and expressive style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
